description: The Rangemaster Toledo 110 Dual Fuel is a staple for professional-style home kitchens, offering two large 80-litre fan ovens and a dedicated glide-out grill. This standard 110cm model provides an expansive gas hob featuring five burners, specifically including a powerful 3.5kW multi-ring wok burner for high-heat sautéing. Unlike the XT variant, this classic version focuses on straightforward fan-assisted cooking in both cavities, complemented by a handy storage drawer for baking trays and a half-ribbed/half-smooth griddle plate that sits securely over the burners.
features: 5-zone gas hob configuration, 3.5kW multi-ring wok burner, dual 73L/80L programmable fan ovens, catalytic liners, cast iron pan supports, dedicated glide-out grill assembly.
uses: Simultaneous high-volume baking, high-BTU wok searing, precision simmering, grilling, multi-rack convection roasting.

accessories.name: Pan Supports
accessories.description: Heavy-duty cast iron supports for thermal stability and vessel retention.

accessories.name: Wok Cradle
accessories.description: Stabilising attachment for concave cooking vessels on the 3.5kW burner.

accessories.name: Griddle Plate
accessories.description: Cast aluminium flat-top surface for direct contact searing.

accessories.name: Oven Shelves
accessories.description: Wire racks for multi-level cavity utilisation.

accessories.name: Handyrack
accessories.description: Door-mounted roasting tray system for accessible basting.

accessories.name: Splashback
accessories.description: Rear vertical guard for thermal and debris protection.

name: Rangemaster Toledo 110 Dual Fuel
